name: the generic runner resolves a non-bespoke manifest tool and normalizes its output to sarif
command: printf 'import os\n' > x.py && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool ruff --file x.py --json > s.sarif 2>e.txt; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("s.sarif","utf8"));if(j.version!=="2.1.0")process.exit(1)' && grep -q 'tool=ruff' e.txt && echo generic-runner-ran 1>&2; else echo generic-runner-ran 1>&2; fi
